prompt:
Update flux flake input URL after repo transfer.

In flake.nix line 7, change:
  flux.url = "github:patflynn/flux";
to:
  flux.url = "github:gunk-dev/flux";

Then run 'nix flake update flux' to update flake.lock with the new URL.
Run 'nix flake check' to verify everything still works.

This is a one-line change plus lock file update. Keep the PR minimal.
